queries.question: How many extras are in the most expensive property?
queries.sql:
SELECT House.Fees
FROM House JOIN
SaleRecord ON House.id = SaleRecord.house_id
WHERE SaleRecord.purchase_price = (
                               SELECT MAX(SaleRecord.purchase_price) FROM SaleRecord
                               )
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/housingmarket#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/housingmarket/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?fees WHERE {
  ?house a :House .
  ?salerecord a :SaleRecord .
  ?salerecord p:hasHouse ?house .
  ?house p:Fees ?fees .
  ?salerecord p:purchase_price ?purchase_price_x .
  { SELECT (MAX(?m0) AS ?m) WHERE { ?s0 p:purchase_price ?m0 } }
  FILTER(xsd:double(?purchase_price_x) = xsd:double(?m))
}

queries.question: How many extras are in the most expensive property?
queries.sql:
SELECT House.Fees, Taxes
FROM House JOIN
SaleRecord ON House.id = SaleRecord.house_id
WHERE SaleRecord.purchase_price = (
                               SELECT MAX(SaleRecord.purchase_price) FROM SaleRecord
                               )
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/housingmarket#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/housingmarket/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?fees ?taxes WHERE {
  ?house a :House .
  ?salerecord a :SaleRecord .
  ?salerecord p:hasHouse ?house .
  ?house p:Fees ?fees .
  ?house p:Taxes ?taxes .
  ?salerecord p:purchase_price ?purchase_price_x .
  { SELECT (MAX(?m0) AS ?m) WHERE { ?s0 p:purchase_price ?m0 } }
  FILTER(xsd:double(?purchase_price_x) = xsd:double(?m))

queries.question: What are the taxes associated with the condo?
queries.sql:
SELECT House.Taxes
FROM House 
    JOIN PropertyType ON PropertyType.id = House. property_type_id
WHERE PropertyType.type = "Condo"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/housingmarket#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/housingmarket/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?taxes WHERE {
  ?house a :House .
  ?propertytype a :PropertyType .
  ?house p:hasPropertyType ?propertytype .
  ?house p:Taxes ?taxes .
  ?propertytype p:type ?type_f .
  FILTER(STR(?type_f) = STR("Condo"))
}

queries.question: How many fees are in the condo?
queries.sql:
SELECT House.Fees
FROM House 
    JOIN PropertyType ON PropertyType.id = House. property_type_id
WHERE PropertyType.type = "Condo"

PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/housingmarket#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/housingmarket/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>

  ?house a :House .
  ?propertytype a :PropertyType .

queries.question: What are the fees associated with the condo and the corresponding taxes?
queries.sql:
SELECT House.Fees, Taxes
FROM House 
    JOIN PropertyType ON PropertyType.id = House. property_type_id
WHERE PropertyType.type = "Condo"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/housingmarket#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/housingmarket/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?fees ?taxes WHERE {
  ?house a :House .
  ?propertytype a :PropertyType .
  ?house p:hasPropertyType ?propertytype .
  ?house p:Fees ?fees .
  ?house p:Taxes ?taxes .
  ?propertytype p:type ?type_f .
  FILTER(STR(?type_f) = STR("Condo"))
}
